description_long: This object is a rectangular CD player with a dark woodgrain finish on its top and sides, featuring two prominent stickers: one with a blue and white design and another with a cartoonish character. The front panel is black with a digital display area, a row of labeled buttons, and a disc tray slot, all outlined in subtle red lines. The left and right sides each have a circular wooden knob, blending into the wood texture. The back and sides are plain, with no visible ports or connectors. The overall design is retro, combining a classic wood aesthetic with modern electronic controls. The surface appears hard and smooth, with a slight sheen reflecting light.
description: A rectangular, wood-finished CD player with a black front panel, digital display, and control buttons, decorated with two stickers on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black control panel with display, disc tray slot, and labeled buttons, plus two stickers on the wood top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the woodgrain texture and a circular wooden knob, with stickers partially visible on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain wood surface with both stickers visible, no controls or ports.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the woodgrain and a circular knob, with stickers on the top.
